sentences.arabic: أَعْتَقِدُ أَنَّ الْمُوسِيقَى تُرِيحُ الْعَقْلَ وَالْقَلْبَ.
sentences.translation: Smatram da muzika umiruje um i srce.
sentences.translationEn: I believe that music calms the mind and the heart.

sentences.arabic: أَسْمَعُ مُوسِيقَى هَادِئَةً حِينَ أَكُونُ مُتْعَبًا.
sentences.translation: Slušam mirnu muziku kada sam umoran.
sentences.translationEn: I listen to calm music when I am tired.

sentences.arabic: الْمُوسِيقَى لُغَةٌ يَفْهَمُهَا كُلُّ النَّاسِ فِي كُلِّ مَكَانٍ.
sentences.translation: Muzika je jezik koji svi razumiju na svakom mjestu.
sentences.translationEn: Music is a language that all people understand everywhere.

sentences.arabic: لَا يَهُمُّ مِنْ أَيِّ بَلَدٍ تَكُونُ، الْمُوسِيقَى تَجْمَعُنَا.
sentences.translation: Nije važno iz koje si zemlje, muzika nas ujedinjuje.
sentences.translationEn: It does not matter what country you are from, music brings us together.
